_publications._publicationTitle: Combined Inhibition of SHP2 and MEK Is Effective in Models of NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors

details: JH-2-002 MPNST cell line tested in vitro (CCK-8 viability, soft agar, western blot, kinome profiling); combined trametinib (MEKi) + SHP099/RMC-4550 (SHP2i) produced synergistic ERK suppression and growth inhibition, overcoming adaptive RAS-GTP reactivation through RTK-mediated feedback that limits single-agent MEKi efficacy
